gimbal-2015.name: Gimbal (USS Theodore Roosevelt, 2015)
gimbal-2015.location: Off the coast of Jacksonville, FL
gimbal-2015.summary: FLIR ATFLIR pod video from a Super Hornet showing an apparently rotating, hovering object against the wind.

eastern-seaboard-2014-2019.name: Eastern Seaboard sightings (2014–2019)
eastern-seaboard-2014-2019.summary: Sustained observations of UAP by Navy aviators training along the East Coast through the 2010s.

stephenville-2008.name: Stephenville (2008)
stephenville-2008.summary: Multi-witness UAP sighting in central Texas with corroborating radar tracks reported by MUFON.

roswell-1947.name: Roswell Incident (1947)
roswell-1947.summary: Recovery of debris near Roswell Army Air Field initially announced as a 'flying disc' before retraction.

washington-dc-1952.name: Washington D.C. flap (1952)
washington-dc-1952.summary: Two consecutive weekends of radar/visual UAP encounters over D.C. that prompted CIA's Robertson Panel.

aaro.name: All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office
aaro.summary: DoD office responsible for UAP investigation since 2022; publisher of historical record reviews.
